hints.text: UK territory in the South Pacific (counts as UK); all coverage = a **Gen3 trekker** on just 2 islands (Pitcairn & Henderson)
Semi-tropical, **densely forested**; most coverage is small **dirt tracks** through forest; soil is very **red**
**Adamstown** = the only settlement (NE shore), some roads concrete rather than dirt; 'The Landing' dock has many small ATVs
**Henderson Island** coverage = only two white-sand beaches (north & east shore)
